name: Patient Case
history: Financial difficulties following questionable investments. Increased reliance on parents for financial assistance.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I can't manage my finances, I am a failure.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will never be able to succeed on my own.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of financial discussions, reliance on parents for support.
situation: A discussion with family members about future plans and potential career changes.
auto_thought: They must think I'm a failure because I need their help.
behavior: Avoids discussing financial issues openly, hesitates to make independent career decisions.
